messages.content: give a short title: The newly established company was formally incorporated in 2017 and is strategically situated in Changchun, China, a distinguished center for optical research and development. Since its inception, the company has undergone three substantial leaps in development, demonstrating its commitment to growth and advancement.
Three Leaps of Growth: An Optical Company's Journey in Changchun

translate in english and rewrite it in formal and professional way: 公司先后引进了具有国际先进水平的加工和检测设备、3D 数字测量仪、Lambda950分光光度计、Trioptics光学传递函数测量仪等具有国际先进水平的检测仪器。 主要研发生产3MP、5MP高清定焦安防监控镜头、20MP像素机器视觉镜头等。产品广泛应用于精密仪器、医疗设备、自动化设备、新型汽车、安防监控、高清道路监控等

Translation: The company has successively introduced internationally advanced processing and testing equipment, such as 3D digital measuring instruments, Lambda950 spectrophotometers, and Trioptics optical transfer function testers. Our primary focus is on the research and production of high-definition fixed-focus surveillance lenses, ranging from 3MP to 5MP, as well as 20MP pixel machine vision lenses. These products find wide applications in precision instruments, medical equipment, automation devices, new automobiles, security surveillance, and high-definition road monitoring.

Rewritten: The company has strategically invested in cutting-edge processing and testing equipment, including internationally advanced instruments like 3D digital measuring devices, Lambda950 spectrophotometers, and Trioptics optical transfer function testers. Our core research and development efforts are directed towards the production of high-definition fixed-focus surveillance lenses, ranging from 3MP to 5MP, as well as 20MP pixel machine vision lenses. These meticulously crafted products cater to a diverse range of industries, covering precision instruments, medical equipment, automation devices, new-generation automobiles, security surveillance, and high-definition road monitoring.

make it shorter: The company has strategically invested in cutting-edge processing and testing equipment, including internationally advanced instruments like 3D digital measuring devices, Lambda950 spectrophotometers, and Trioptics optical transfer function testers. Our core research and development efforts are directed towards the production of high-definition fixed-focus surveillance lenses, ranging from 3MP to 5MP, as well as 20MP pixel machine vision lenses. These meticulously crafted products cater to a diverse range of industries, covering precision instruments, medical equipment, automation devices, new-generation automobiles, security surveillance, and high-definition road monitoring.
Company Invests in Advanced Equipment for High-Definition Surveillance Lenses & Vision Solutions
name a one word title for this sentence: Company Invests in Advanced Equipment for High-Definition Surveillance Lenses & Vision Solutions
translate and rewrite in english: 公司2019年的年产值达4350多万元，并且每年以平均30%的速度快速增长。目前，本公司的产品已具备国际及国内多项质量认证证书。公司现拥有60000平方米的现代化办公厂房，建有精密光学产品生产线和测试中心以及千级超净镜头装配车间。人员扩充至200余人

Translation: In 2019, the company achieved an annual output value of over 43.5 million yuan, with a rapid annual growth rate averaging 30%. Currently, our products hold numerous international and domestic quality certifications. We operate in a modern office facility covering an area of 60,000 square meters, housing advanced production lines and testing centers for precision optical products, as well as a cleanroom lens assembly workshop. Our team has expanded to over 200 employees.

Rewritten: The company's annual output value for 2019 surpassed 43.5 million yuan, experiencing rapid and consistent growth at an average rate of 30% per year. We have successfully obtained various quality certifications, both internationally and domestically, validating the high standards of our products. Our modern office facility, spanning 60,000 square meters, accommodates state-of-the-art production lines, testing centers, and a cleanroom lens assembly workshop, enabling us to meet demanding requirements in the field of precision optics. To support our increasing operations, our dedicated workforce has expanded to over 200 highly skilled professionals.

make it shorter:  The company’s annual output value for 2019 surpassed 43.5 million yuan, experiencing rapid and consistent growth at an average rate of 30% per year. We have successfully obtained various quality certifications, both internationally and domestically, validating the high standards of our products. Our modern office facility, spanning 60,000 square meters, accommodates state-of-the-art production lines, testing centers, and a cleanroom lens assembly workshop, enabling us to meet demanding requirements in the field of precision optics. To support our increasing operations, our dedicated workforce has expanded to over 200 highly skilled professionals
Company Achieves Rapid Growth with Quality Certifications and Expanded Workforce
translate and rewrite: 产品全面升级，产品线扩至20大系列，包括工业相机、远心镜头、远心光源等高分辨率高解析系列产品。

Translation: The products have been comprehensively upgraded, expanding the product line to include 20 major series, such as industrial cameras, telecentric lenses, and telecentric light sources. These series offer high resolution and high resolution capabilities.

Rewritten: Comprehensive Product Upgrades: Expanding to 20 Major Series of High-Resolution and High-Resolution Products, including Industrial Cameras, Telecentric Lenses, and Telecentric Light Sources.
translate and rewrite: 公司将会永不停止探索和发展的脚步，和中国国内以及世界国际性大公司同步发展

Translation: The company will never cease in its pursuit of exploration and development, striving to synchronize its growth with both domestic companies in China and international corporations worldwide.

Rewritten: Unwavering Commitment to Exploration and Synchronized Development with Domestic and Global Industry Leaders.
translate this: 麻省理工大学建筑系硕士，后又获得哈佛大学建筑系博士学位。参加过国内外重大工作。麻省理工大学建筑系硕士，后又获得哈佛大学建筑系博士学位。参加过国内外重大工作。

Translation: Master of Architecture from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), followed by a doctoral degree in Architecture from Harvard University. Participated in significant projects both domestically and internationally.
